plugins.name: claudemux
plugins.description: Multi-repo Claude Code orchestrator. Run one dispatcher session in the parent of your repos; spawn, message, and wait on tmux teammates.

plugins.name: feishu-channel
plugins.description: Feishu (飞书) channel for Claude Code. Receive Feishu messages in a running session and reply back over a long-lived WebSocket connection — no public webhook needed.
